4.title: Service Calls - Processed
4.query:
timeseries processed = avg(dt.sfm.oneagent.service_calls.processed)
| sort arrayAvg(processed) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Oneagent - Agent Modules
5.query:
timeseries agent_modules = avg(dt.sfm.cluster.oneagent.agent_modules)
| sort arrayAvg(agent_modules) desc
| limit 20

6.title: Ingest - Received Bytes
6.query:
timeseries received_bytes = avg(dt.sfm.storage.ingest.received_bytes)
| sort arrayAvg(received_bytes) desc
| limit 20

7.title: Ingest - Received Records
7.query:
timeseries received_records = avg(dt.sfm.storage.ingest.received_records)
| sort arrayAvg(received_records) desc
| limit 20

9.title: Engine Utilization
9.query:
timeseries engine_utilization = avg(dt.sfm.synthetic.engine_utilization),
  by: { dt.entity.synthetic_location }
| fieldsAdd synthetic_location_name = entityName(dt.entity.synthetic_location)
| sort arrayAvg(engine_utilization) desc
| limit 20

10.title: Browser - Engine Utilization
10.query:
timeseries engine_utilization = avg(dt.sfm.synthetic.browser.engine_utilization),
  by: { dt.entity.synthetic_location }
| fieldsAdd synthetic_location_name = entityName(dt.entity.synthetic_location)
| sort arrayAvg(engine_utilization) desc
| limit 20

11.title: Http - Engine Utilization
11.query:
timeseries engine_utilization = avg(dt.sfm.synthetic.http.engine_utilization),
  by: { dt.entity.synthetic_location }
| fieldsAdd synthetic_location_name = entityName(dt.entity.synthetic_location)
| sort arrayAvg(engine_utilization) desc
| limit 20

12.title: Http High Resource - Engine Utilization
12.query:
timeseries engine_utilization = avg(dt.sfm.synthetic.http_high_resource.engine_utilization),
  by: { dt.entity.synthetic_location }
| fieldsAdd synthetic_location_name = entityName(dt.entity.synthetic_location)
| sort arrayAvg(engine_utilization) desc
| limit 20

13.title: Multiprotocol - Engine Utilization
13.query:
timeseries engine_utilization = avg(dt.sfm.synthetic.multiprotocol.engine_utilization)
| sort arrayAvg(engine_utilization) desc
| limit 20
